rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Records
rulings.Rulings: Michelle Sipich's Motion to Seal Records is GRANTED. The Clerk of the Court is ordered to seal Exhibit B of the Petition for Order Authorizing and Directing Conservator and for Substituted Judgment filed on August 7, 2015. The moving party shall prepare a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest this tentative ruling must notify the Court and any opposing counsel no later than November 10, 2015 at 4:00 p.m.
